See your reading progress with a beautiful progress bar. Track which articles you've completed and pick up where you left off.
Remove every colors from your browser for a low dopamine experience.
Save articles offline, no account needed. Read later with tags, search, reader mode — 100% private, all data stays local.

Save articles, web pages, and blog posts to read anytime - no internet required. Fully private, no account needed, no cloud sync. All your data stays in your browser's local storage. Nothing is ever sent anywhere.

WHY TIDYSHELF?
Popular read-later services store your data on their servers - and when those services shut down or change their terms, your saved articles disappear with them. TidyShelf is built on a fundamentally different principle: your reading list belongs exclusively to you. Stored locally on your device, under your complete control - forever. No server outages. No paywalls. No forced cloud subscriptions.

If you are looking for a private, offline read-it-later app that works without an internet connection - TidyShelf is built for you.

CORE FEATURES
One-Click Web Clipper: Save any article, blog post, or web page instantly. Click the extension icon or press Alt+S (Windows) / Ctrl+S (Mac).
Distraction-Free Reader Mode: Strip away ads, pop-ups, and heavy layouts. Clean, minimalist reading environment optimized for focus.
True Offline Reading: Full-text offline saving. Read saved articles without an active internet connection - perfect for commuting, flights, or focus sessions.
Smart Organization with Tags: Categorize your reading queue your way. Tag, filter, and sort your saved articles. Never lose an important piece of research again.
Fast Search: Find saved pages instantly by title, domain, or tag.
Full Data Ownership (Import / Export): Back up your entire reading list as a structured JSON file. You are never locked in.
Reading Statistics: Track saved articles, reading time, top sources, and popular tags. Monitor your personal reading habits at a glance.
Dark Mode & Adjustable Font Size: Long-form reading is easy on the eyes, day or night.

PRIVACY BY DESIGN
No analytics. No trackers. No telemetry.
TidyShelf operates 100% locally on your device. There is no remote server that can be hacked, acquired, or shut down by a corporation. Your browsing history, saved links, and reading queue never leave your browser.

HOW IT WORKS
1. Open any article, tutorial, or web page you want to save for later.
2. Click the TidyShelf icon or press Alt+S (Windows) / Ctrl+S (Mac) to save it instantly.
3. Add tags to organize (optional).
4. Read anytime - online or offline - in clean reader mode.

Completely free. No account required. No servers. Your data never leaves your device.

A web extension to save, manage and restore sessions, windows and tabs.

HorusTabs is a session manager that saves all your open tabs and windows so you can restore them anytime.

Features:
- One-click save & restore — save every open tab, restore them all instantly
- Auto-save & crash recovery — scheduled backups so you never lose tabs
- Tags & search — organize with color-coded tags and full-text search
- Trash bin — deleted sessions are recoverable for up to 90 days
- Tab groups — save and restore Firefox tab groups
- Tab suspender — suspend inactive tabs to free memory
- Import & export — JSON, CSV, or compressed format
- Keyboard shortcuts — fully customizable
- Cloud sync (Pro) — sync sessions across all your devices
- Dark & light themes with accent colors

Your data is safe:
Sessions are stored locally in your browser. Nothing leaves your device unless you enable cloud sync. No tracking, no ads, no lock-in.

Free forever. No account needed. No limits on sessions.

Website: https://horustabs.com
Advanced tab and session manager with multi-window support, session switching, and window restoration

Drowning in tabs? Take back control of your browser.

  Smart Session Management
  Create unlimited sessions within each browser window. Switch instantly between work, research, and personal browsing without losing a single tab. Your tab groups, colors, and organization stay exactly how you left them.

  AI-Powered Summaries
  Never forget what you were working on. Our built-in AI automatically summarizes each session based on your browsing activity—so you can jump back into any project with full context, even days later.

  Multi-Window Mastery
  Managing multiple windows? We've got you covered. See all your windows at a glance, track tab counts, and seamlessly switch between them from one elegant interface.

  Never Lose Your Work Again
  Accidentally closed a window? Restore your last 10 closed windows with all sessions intact. One click brings everything back.

  Privacy First
  All data stays on your device. AI processing runs locally via Chrome's Gemini Nano—no cloud services, no tracking, no account required.

  Key Features:
  - Unlimited sessions per window
  - One-click session switching
  - AI session summaries (powered by Gemini Nano)
  - Closed window restoration
  - Tab group preservation
  - Memory-efficient tab suspension
  - Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+F / Cmd+Shift+F)

  Stop juggling tabs. Start managing them.

Problem
The main problem with not closing my tabs is that my desktop gets super disorganized, which is a hugely discomforting…

Problem
The main problem with not closing my tabs is that my desktop gets super disorganized, which is a hugely discomforting feeling and seeing as chrome devours my computer's RAM I find my hardware to become a lot slower.

Solution
This is a chrome web extension to solve all your problems. It's extremely simple to use, lightweight, secure, simply pin the extension, click save workspace to save all tabs in the current window, click view workspaces to see all your saved workspaces, and then to reopen a workspace, simply click the play button at the top right of the workspace. If you no longer need a workspace, simply click the x button. But if you didn't mean to do it, its ok, go to the recently deleted tab to see the last four of your most recently deleted workspaces.
A personal internet queue. Save first, organize later — a calm, fast layer between the browser and your attention.

Slate is a modern personal internet queue for people who constantly discover interesting things online but don’t want to manage bookmarks.

Save videos, articles, GitHub repos, Reddit threads, and links instantly — then continue browsing without losing them.

Instead of forcing organization, Slate is built around temporary attention:

save now
revisit later
keep only what matters

Slate feels less like a bookmark manager and more like an extension of your attention.

Shows your bookmarks bar with 2x favicon icons and labels in a fast popup.

Big Favorites Bar / Chrome Icon Enlarger improves the visibility of extension icons in the Chrome toolbar by making them larger, clearer, and easier to click.

Chrome’s default extension icons can appear very small, especially on high-resolution monitors, large displays, or laptops with scaled UI settings. When you install many extensions, the toolbar quickly becomes cluttered and icons become difficult to recognize.

This extension solves that problem by enlarging Chrome extension icons, making your toolbar easier to navigate and improving productivity.

Whether you're a developer, power user, or someone who uses many browser tools, larger icons make a noticeable difference in everyday browsing.

🔧 Key Features

✔ Enlarges Chrome extension toolbar icons
✔ Improves visibility on high-resolution displays
✔ Makes extension buttons easier to click
✔ Works instantly after installation
✔ Lightweight and fast
✔ No configuration required
✔ Clean and simple design

💡 Why Use Bigger Chrome Toolbar Icons?

Many Chrome users install 10–30+ extensions, including tools for:

• development
• productivity
• crypto wallets
• SEO tools
• automation tools
• password managers

When the toolbar becomes crowded, Chrome shrinks the icons and they become difficult to see.

Chrome Icon Enlarger fixes this usability issue by making icons larger and easier to identify.

Benefits include:

• faster access to extensions
• easier visual recognition
• improved accessibility
• better usability on large monitors
• cleaner toolbar layout

🖥 Perfect For

• Developers using many extensions
• Productivity power users
• High-resolution or 4K monitors
• Users with accessibility needs
• Anyone tired of tiny toolbar icons

⚡ Lightweight and Private

This extension is designed to be extremely lightweight and runs entirely inside your browser.

It does not collect any data, does not track users, and does not send any information externally.

Everything works locally inside Chrome.

🔓 Open Source

This project is open source and available on GitHub:

https://github.com/mysticalg/Chrome-Icon-Enlarger

Contributions, feedback, and feature suggestions are welcome.

🚀 Improve Your Chrome Toolbar Today

If you want a cleaner, clearer, and easier-to-use Chrome toolbar, Chrome Icon Enlarger is the perfect solution.

Install it today and make your extension icons easier to see and use.

Sidebar extension for managing tabs in a tree structure

もう、タブの迷子にならない。
Chromeのサイドパネルを利用して、増えすぎたタブを「ツリー形式」や「最近使った順」でスマートに整理・管理できる究極のタブマネージャーです。

【魅力的な詳細説明】
「調べ物をしていたら、いつの間にかタブが細くなって中身が分からない…」
「さっきまで見ていたタブがどこにあるか見つからない」
そんなストレスを、Tree Tab Managerが解消します。

Google Chromeの最新機能（Side Panel API / Manifest V3）をフル活用し、ブラウジングを妨げない快適な操作感を実現しました。

【主な特徴】
🌿 視覚的に整理する「ツリー表示」
リンクから開いたタブを自動的に「親子関係」として階層表示。情報の関連性が一目でわかります。ドラッグ＆ドロップで親子関係を自由に入れ替えることも可能です。

🕐 迷わず戻れる「最近開いた順モード」
ツリー構造だけでなく、最後に使った時刻順にタブを並べ替えることができます。たくさんのタブを開きっぱなしにしていても、今必要なタブにすぐアクセスできます。

📂 完璧な「グループ機能」連携
Chrome標準のタブグループに完全対応。サイドパネルからグループの色変更や名前の編集、一括操作がスムーズに行えます。

📌 固定タブ（ピン）専用セクション
大事なタブは上部に固定。通常のタブと切り分けて表示されるため、常に使いたいツールを見失いません。

💾 安心の「セッション保存」
現在のタブの状態（親子関係やピン留め、グループ状況まで！）をまるごと保存。後から別のウィンドウで一気に復元できるので、作業の切り替えも自由自在です。

🔍 履歴・ブックマークもこれひとつで
タブ管理だけでなく、履歴やブックマークの閲覧・検索機能も搭載。サイドパネルを開くだけで、ブラウザ内のあらゆる情報にアクセス可能です。

【その他のこだわり機能】
3つの表示モード: 通常・コンパクト・ミニから、あなたの画面サイズに最適なデザインを選べます。

タブ名のカスタム: わかりにくいページタイトルを自分好みの名前に書き換え可能。

ドメインまとめ: 同じドメインのタブをワンクリックで子タブとして集約。

ダークモード対応: 目に優しいデザインで、長時間の作業をサポート。

【使い方は簡単】
拡張機能をインストール。

ツールバーの拡張機能アイコンをクリックしてサイドパネルを開く。

左側のタブ一覧から、新しいブラウジング体験をスタート！
Navigate without being distracted by totally blocking websites of your choice or add a time limit to a group of websites.

Navigate without being distracted by totally blocking websites of your choice or add a time limit to a group of websites or directly a custom time limit for each websites of your choice. You can also add a password to modify those settings and if you don't trust yourself, there's even a hardcore mode to avoid unblocking a website. Finally, you can export and import your settings to switch of browser without having to reset-up everything.
Bigger, customizable tab tiles with groups, sizing controls, and fast navigation.

BoomerTabs is built for people who keep many tabs open and need a cleaner, faster way to navigate.

Key capabilities:

- Multi-row tab layouts with configurable row count
- Adjustable tabs-per-row, tab width, icon size, label size, and padding
- Drag-and-drop tab reordering directly in the custom rows
- Group-aware tabs with collapse support and clear group color markers
- Search and filter tabs by title or URL
- Search icon toggle that shows/hides a dedicated search row
- Footer or header placement
- Overlay mode and push mode (push avoids page overlap)
- Per-row horizontal scrolling (mouse wheel + trackpad gestures)
- Hidden scrollbar UI (keeps more vertical room for tabs/content)
- Pinned-tab handling with optional icon-only pinned tabs
- Quick hide/show controls and keyboard shortcuts
- Toolbar popup quick controls for layout/rows/groups without opening full settings

and AI Librarian for your Browser.

The essential all-in-one hub to navigate, orchestrate, annotate, and curate your entire online life.

◦ Pinako keeps your browser tabs neatly organized in a clear outline with foldable nested layers you control, including the tabs and windows you've closed but want to come back to.
◦ Group windows and tabs into shareable libraries and attach styled notes with pictures, audio or videos.
◦ Add colors, tags and memos to anything, and search across everything with built-in AI.
◦ Use the integrated AI Librarian to help you edit and organize anything.
◦ Open your Pinako from any browser or device, and edit shared libraries with others in real time.

No ads, no tracking, no data selling.

The free extension includes the core tab tree manager, libraries, bookmarks, smart session restore, rich-text notes, local backups, auto-snapshots, and many more features. Paid tiers unlock AI tools (search, chat panel, AI Bridge for MCP clients), cloud sync, web portal, collaboration, multimedia embeds, and more. Go to Pinako.Pro to try a 14-day free trial of Pro or Pro Plus. 

Features:

• Advanced hierarchical tree operations.  
• Libraries for organizing and sharing link collections.  
• Rich-text documents with multimedia embeds attached to any tree.  
• Full-featured collaborative workspaces with REAL-TIME edit synchronization.  
• Annotate tabs, windows, and folders with tags, memos, and color coding.  
• AI-enabled NATURAL LANGUAGE SEARCH across all your trees, notes, and browser bookmarks.
• Built-in AI LIBRARIAN chat panel that can edit, organize, summarize, and restructure your tabs, tags, libraries, notes, and bookmarks through natural conversation.
• Pinako AI Bridge: MCP integration that lets Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, and other AI clients on your desktop read and edit your Pinako directly.
• Seamless integration with Chrome Tab Groups.  
• View, organize, and edit your old BROWSER BOOKMARKS collection in hierarchical tree-form.  
• Access and pull tabs from mobile devices into your tab trees.  
• Cloud sync, web portal, and 9 DIFFERENT BACKUP methods, including BLOCKCHAIN integration.  
• Search and retrieve tabs from local snapshot history.  
• Restore browser session while MAINTAINING TREE STRUCTURE.  
• Load favorites on start-up while maintaining tree structure.  
• Remove distractions and quickly switch contexts with preselected tab sets.  
• Fully customizable appearance, synced across devices and browsers.  
• Flexible user options & extensive keyboard shortcuts, all configurable.  
• Import ALL your data from ANY OTHER TAB MANAGER, automatically parsed and structured. 
	▸Migrate with full automatic conversion from extensions including:
	◦ Session Buddy
	◦ Toby
	◦ Workona
	◦ Tabs Outliner
	◦ BrainTool
	◦ Link Map
	◦ TabXpert
	◦ OneTab
	◦ and more.

Go to Pinako.Pro for full feature details, pricing, and to start a free trial of any paid tier.

Middle-click anywhere or press Ctrl+Space to open a tab switcher near your cursor. Links still open in a new tab as usual.

Taban lets you instantly switch between open tabs without reaching for the tab bar.

How it works:
• Middle-click anywhere on a page to open a tab switcher popup right at your cursor
• Or press Ctrl+Space to open it centered on screen
• Type to search/filter tabs by title or URL
• Use arrow keys + Enter to navigate, or just click
• Close tabs directly from the list with the ✕ button
• Press Escape or click outside to dismiss

Middle-click on links still works normally - clicking a link with the middle button opens it in a new tab as expected. Taban only activates when you middle-click on empty space.

Minimal & fast - no background activity, no data collection, no analytics. Taban only runs when you trigger it.

Permissions explained:
• tabs - to list and switch between your open tabs
• favicon - to show tab icons in the switcher
• Host permissions - the content script needs to run on all pages to detect your middle-click
Shift+Click and grab anything from the web. Bid farewell to haunting tabs in your browser.

📌 Introducing Pin Chrome Extension by Anymode.ai

Elevate your web browsing experience with Pin, the revolutionary Chrome extension developed by Anymode.ai. Pin allows you to effortlessly save anything from any website with a simple Shift+click. Say goodbye to the hassle of copying and pasting URLs or using multiple bookmarking tools. Pin makes it easy to curate and organize your online discoveries seamlessly, bidding farewell to the days of haunting tabs in your browser.

Key Features
🖱️ Shift+Click Magic: Save anything on the web by pressing Shift+click – it's that simple!
🌐 Universal Compatibility: Pin works across all websites, making it your go-to tool for saving articles, images, products, and more.
📂 Organize with Ease: Create custom folders and tags to organize your pinned items for quick retrieval.
🖇 Publish: Share you collection of websites with anyone.
🌟 Versatility: Save content from authenticated websites with ease, expanding Pin's reach to all corners of the web.

Say Farewell to Haunting Tabs
🚀 Efficiency: Bid farewell to the clutter of open tabs in your browser. Pin streamlines your web-saving process, freeing you from the burden of managing multiple tabs.

How to Use
🛠️ Install Pin: Add the Pin extension to your Chrome browser.
🖱️ Shift+Click to Pin: Discover something interesting? Simply press Shift+click to save it instantly.
📂 Organize Your Pins: Create pages to keep your pinned content organized.

Upgrade your browsing experience with Pin – the intuitive Chrome extension that puts the power of seamless web saving at your fingertips. Developed by Anymode.ai, Pin is the next step in revolutionizing how you curate and manage your online discoveries. Download Pin today and bid farewell to the clutter of haunting tabs, embracing a more organized and efficient web browsing journey!
Your favorites when you need them, out of the way when you don't.

DynamicFavorites replaces the built-in favorites bar with one that stays hidden until you need it. Move your mouse to the top of the page and it slides into view. You get full access to your bookmarks without the clutter.

What it does:

• Hide-on-demand bar that appears on hover (with adjustable trigger area and delay)
• Display your existing bookmarks and folders
• Open folders on hover or click (your choice)
• Drag and drop to reorganize, including dropping URLs from the address bar to create new bookmarks
• Right-click for quick actions: open, open all, rename, delete
• Rename bookmarks directly from the bar
• Access your browser's native favorites manager with one click

Optional new tab page:

The extension includes a new tab page override (off by default). This exists so the favorites bar can appear on new tabs with the same look and behavior as on regular pages. The new tab page also includes a clock, search bar, top sites, and recently closed tabs.

If you use another new tab extension, install it after this one. The last-installed extension's new tab takes priority.

Customize to your taste:

• Bar height, spacing, and font size
• Animation speed and transition behavior
• Full-width or content-width bar, with alignment and corner radius options
• Light, dark, or system theme
• Visibility toggle for the manage button
• New tab: clock format, search engine, number of top sites and recent tabs

About this extension:

This is a personal extension I built for myself, so it is highly opinionated. Sharing it in case others would find it useful. Feedback or ideas are appreciated, but unless I find a use for it myself, I would not want to feature creep the extension.

Changelog:

v1.0.5
• Smoother drag-and-drop: live reorder animations, drag-into-folder support
• Toggle animations on/off in settings

v1.0.4
• Fixed middle-click on a folder accidentally firing inside nested subfolders

v1.0.3
• Site blacklist: disable the bar on specific sites
• New "Manage" menu: add the current page, create folders, disable site, open favorites manager
• Drag URLs from the address bar onto the bar to save them

v1.0.2
• Bar now (in most cases) hides properly on pages with iframes (Google Docs, Office 365)
• Confirmation prompt when opening a folder with many links at once
• Various UI polishes

v1.0.1
• New Tab page override with clock, search, top sites, and recent tabs
• Fixed settings occasionally failing to load on first install
• Better detection of fast mouse movement into the trigger zone

v1.0.0
• Initial release
